title: Parts of a Computer
subtitle: Meet the Computer Family!
overview: In this session, students learn the basic parts of a computer including Monitor, CPU, Keyboard, and Mouse. Students understand the use of each part with real-life examples and identify where they see these computer parts in schools, offices, banks, homes, and shops.

images._note: Add real photos of computer parts, students using computers, keyboard typing practice, and classroom computer lab images.

activity.title: Identify and Use Computer Parts
steps: Ask students to identify each part
Explain the use of monitor, CPU, keyboard and mouse
Students practice typing their names on keyboard
Students move and click mouse on screen
Challenge: Match computer parts with their functions

quiz.q: Which part of the computer shows pictures and videos?
quiz.explanation: The monitor displays text, pictures and videos.

quiz.q: Which part is called the brain of the computer?
quiz.explanation: CPU processes information and controls the computer.

quiz.q: Which part is used for typing?
quiz.explanation: Keyboard helps us type letters, numbers and symbols.

quiz.q: Which device is used to click and select items?
quiz.explanation: Mouse is used to move the pointer and click.

quiz.q: Which computer part is an output device?
quiz.explanation: Monitor shows output from the computer.

quiz.q: Which of these is an input device?
quiz.explanation: Keyboard sends input to the computer.

quiz.q: Where have you seen a computer keyboard?
quiz.explanation: Keyboards are used in many places.

quiz.q: What do we move on the table to control the pointer?
quiz.explanation: Moving the mouse moves the pointer on the screen.

quiz.q: Which part stores and processes data?
quiz.explanation: CPU processes and manages computer tasks.

quiz.q: Which part looks like a TV screen?
quiz.explanation: Monitor is the screen of the computer.

quiz.q: What can we do using a keyboard?
quiz.explanation: Keyboard is used for many typing tasks.

quiz.q: Computers in shops are mainly used for:
quiz.explanation: Shops use computers for billing and records.

quiz.q: Which part helps us see our work?
quiz.explanation: Monitor displays everything we do on the computer.

quiz.q: All computer parts work together like:
quiz.explanation: Each computer part has a special job and works together.
